reason: Verified that agent QA-20260714-142603-h272 can execute browser commands to navigate to https://example.com and correctly report the page title "Example Domain"

Waited up to 3 minutes for the agent to complete the browser task — Agent completed successfully within approximately 20 seconds, as shown in the "Worked for 20s" indicator
Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Agent response displays:
